scripts.dev: VIGOLIUM_AUTH_API_KEY=$(vigolium config view server.auth_api_key --force | awk '{print $3}') next dev --turbopack -p 5002
scripts.dev:console: VIGOLIUM_AUTH_API_KEY=$(vigolium config view server.auth_api_key --force | awk '{print $3}') next dev --turbopack -p 5002
scripts.dev:clean: rm -rf .next && VIGOLIUM_AUTH_API_KEY=$(vigolium config view server.auth_api_key --force | awk '{print $3}') next dev --turbopack -p 5002
scripts.build:console: rm -rf .next dist-console && next build && cp -r .next dist-console && rm -rf dist-console/dev
scripts.build:workbench: rm -rf .next-workbench dist-workbench && NEXT_PUBLIC_BUILD_MODE=static next build && cp -r .next-workbench dist-workbench && rm -rf dist-workbench/__next.* dist-workbench/dev
scripts.build:all: bun run build:workbench && bun run build:console
